sleuthMetadata.scenario: NetworkMonitor slow_request at 1000 ms threshold (1020 ms preset, observed 1035 ms)
sleuthMetadata.captureNotes: Retained orphan (v0.16.5). Recorded for NetworkMonitorDetector.slow_request.warning at bracket (observed 1035 ms vs 1000 ms threshold) but currently unreferenced: v0.16.5's staged externallyCited raise was reverted after /advanced-adversarial-review caught NN/g semantic mismatch + capture-proves-helper-not-detector blockers, so NetworkMonitorDetector.profileCapturePaths is null. Tracked in test/validation/detector_metadata_audit_test.dart retainedOrphans manifest with consumeBy='0.16.7' (v0.16.6 shipped FrameTiming+ListView tier raises instead; NetworkMonitor re-raise deferred). Recorded via NetworkMonitor Capture Helper (example/lib/demos/network_monitor_capture_screen.dart); loopback HttpServer at 127.0.0.1:<port>/slow?delay=<ms>. Scenario markers via developer.Timeline.instantSync (ph='n' after Perfetto traceconv). Source export: at.json
